member.name: T:Geocoding.Google.BusinessKey
member.summary: Represents Google Maps signed request credentials.

member.name: P:Geocoding.Google.BusinessKey.ClientId
member.summary: Gets or sets the Google Maps client identifier.

member.name: P:Geocoding.Google.BusinessKey.SigningKey
member.summary: Gets or sets the private signing key.

member.name: P:Geocoding.Google.BusinessKey.Channel
member.summary: Gets or sets the usage reporting channel.

member.name: P:Geocoding.Google.BusinessKey.HasChannel
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether a channel has been configured.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Google.BusinessKey.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Google.BusinessKey.GenerateSignature(System.String)
member.summary: Signs a Google Maps URL with the configured business key.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Google.BusinessKey.Equals(Geocoding.Google.BusinessKey)
member.summary: Determines whether this instance and another business key are equal.
member.param: The other business key to compare.
member.returns: true if the keys are equal; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:Geocoding.Google.GoogleAddress
member.summary: Represents an address returned by the Google geocoding service.

member.name: P:Geocoding.Google.GoogleAddress.Type
member.summary: Gets the primary Google address type for the result.

member.name: P:Geocoding.Google.GoogleAddress.LocationType
member.summary: Gets the Google location type for the result.

member.name: P:Geocoding.Google.GoogleAddress.Components
member.summary: Gets the Google address components for the result.

member.name: P:Geocoding.Google.GoogleAddress.IsPartialMatch
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the result is a partial match.

member.name: P:Geocoding.Google.GoogleAddress.Viewport
member.summary: Gets the viewport returned by Google.

member.name: P:Geocoding.Google.GoogleAddress.Bounds
member.summary: Gets the bounds returned by Google.

member.name: P:Geocoding.Google.GoogleAddress.Item(Geocoding.Google.GoogleAddressType)
member.summary: Gets the first address component matching the specified type.
member.returns: The matching component, or null if no component matches.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Google.GoogleAddress.#ctor(Geocoding.Google.GoogleAddressType,System.String,Geocoding.Google.GoogleAddressComponent[],Geocoding.Location,Geocoding.Google.GoogleViewport,Geocoding.Bounds,System.Boolean,Geocoding.Google.GoogleLocationType,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The formatted address returned by Google.
Whether the result is a partial match.
The location type returned by Google.

member.name: T:Geocoding.Google.GoogleAddressComponent
member.summary: Represents a component within a Google geocoding result.

member.name: P:Geocoding.Google.GoogleAddressComponent.Types
member.summary: Gets the Google address types associated with the component.

member.name: P:Geocoding.Google.GoogleAddressComponent.LongName
member.summary: Gets the long name for the component.

member.name: P:Geocoding.Google.GoogleAddressComponent.ShortName
member.summary: Gets the short name for the component.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Google.GoogleAddressComponent.#ctor(Geocoding.Google.GoogleAddressType[],System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The Google address types for the component.

member.name: T:Geocoding.Google.GoogleAddressType
member.summary: Represents the address type returned by the Google geocoding service.

member.name: T:Geocoding.Google.GoogleComponentFilter
member.summary: Represents a Google component filter for geocoding requests.

member.name: P:Geocoding.Google.GoogleComponentFilter.ComponentFilter
member.summary: Gets or sets the serialized component filter string.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Google.GoogleComponentFilter.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Geocoding.Google.GoogleComponentFilterType
member.summary: Defines supported Google component filter names.

member.name: T:Geocoding.Google.GoogleGeocoder
member.summary: Provides geocoding and reverse geocoding through the Google Maps geocoding API.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Google.GoogleGeocoder.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Google.GoogleGeocoder.#ctor(Geocoding.Google.BusinessKey)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The Google business key used to sign requests.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Google.GoogleGeocoder.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Geocoding.Google.GoogleGeocoder.ApiKey
member.summary: Gets or sets the Google Maps API key.

member.name: P:Geocoding.Google.GoogleGeocoder.BusinessKey
member.summary: Gets or sets the Google business key used to sign requests.

member.name: P:Geocoding.Google.GoogleGeocoder.Proxy
member.summary: Gets or sets the proxy used for Google requests.

member.name: P:Geocoding.Google.GoogleGeocoder.Language
member.summary: Gets or sets the language used for results.

member.name: P:Geocoding.Google.GoogleGeocoder.RegionBias
member.summary: Gets or sets the regional bias used for requests.

member.name: P:Geocoding.Google.GoogleGeocoder.BoundsBias
member.summary: Gets or sets the bounds bias used for requests.

member.name: P:Geocoding.Google.GoogleGeocoder.ComponentFilters
member.summary: Gets or sets the Google component filters used for requests.

member.name: P:Geocoding.Google.GoogleGeocoder.ServiceUrl
member.summary: Gets the base Google service URL including configured request options.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Google.GoogleGeocoder.BuildClient
member.summary: Builds the HTTP client used for Google requests.

member.name: T:Geocoding.Google.GoogleGeocodingException
member.summary: Represents an error returned by the Google geocoding provider.

member.name: P:Geocoding.Google.GoogleGeocodingException.Status
member.summary: Gets the Google status associated with the failure.

member.name: P:Geocoding.Google.GoogleGeocodingException.ProviderMessage
member.summary: Gets the provider-supplied error message when Google returns one.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Google.GoogleGeocodingException.#ctor(Geocoding.Google.GoogleStatus)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The Google status associated with the failure.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Google.GoogleGeocodingException.#ctor(Geocoding.Google.GoogleStatus,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The Google status associated with the failure.

member.name: M:Geocoding.Google.GoogleGeocodingException.#ctor(System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Geocoding.Google.GoogleLocationType
member.summary: Represents the location type returned by the Google geocoding service.

member.name: T:Geocoding.Google.GoogleStatus
member.summary: Represents the status returned by the Google geocoding service.

member.name: F:Geocoding.Google.GoogleStatus.OverDailyLimit
member.summary: The OverDailyLimit value (billing or API key issue).

member.name: T:Geocoding.Google.GoogleViewport
member.summary: Represents a viewport returned by the Google geocoding service.

member.name: P:Geocoding.Google.GoogleViewport.Northeast
member.summary: Gets or sets the northeast corner of the viewport.

member.name: P:Geocoding.Google.GoogleViewport.Southwest
member.summary: Gets or sets the southwest corner of the viewport.
